subcodes.first_line: The meanings have soared for a thousand years to attain unto the station of this utterance which hath been spoken by the Tongue of God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد طار المعانی الف سنه لیصل الی مقام هذا اللفظ الذی تفوه به لسان الله
subcodes.subjects: @eulogies; reminiscences, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering
